headline: Carmax shares are trading higher following a report suggesting that activist investor Starboard Value has taken a stake in the company and nominated two director candidates for board seats.
summary: Carmax shares are trading higher following a report suggesting that activist investor Starboard Value has taken a stake in the company and nominated two director candidates for board seats.
